title: Mel Karade Rabba
desc: Rajveer is madly in love with Seerat, but Rajveer's arch-enemy, Nihaal proposes to Seerat. Their desire to win her heart turns into a violent enmity.

title: Har Har Mahadev
desc: Lord Shiva, an ascetic, and Goddess Shakti create the cosmos together. They separate for creation's sake, but reunite when she is reborn as Goddess Parvati.

title: Crime Stories
